case_title: JIZRAWI, VICTOR VS NISSAN MOTOR CORP./ ATTN: REEDY, ROSEMARY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,251.87 FILED BY JIZRAWI, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NISSAN MOTOR CORP./ ATTN: REEDY, ROSEMARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NISSAN MOTOR CORP./ ATTN: REEDY, ROSEMARY
